name: webnovel-ip-agent
description: All-genre webnovel IP agent — turns an idea into a production-ready webnovel IP via a Claude-powered multi-agent pipeline. Three studios: Production, Operations, and the AI-foresight 'Park Seong-Woo' signature mode.
